Title: MY GrabPayLater
Content:
Last Update : Dec 30, 2025

MO PIC : Nora Atika

Xendit Stakeholders

Department

PIC

PIC Role

Partnership

Musa Sharuddin

Partnership PIC for Shopeepay

Partner PIC

Communication Channel: via WhatsApp Group (WAG).

Name

Email

Serena

+60126952855

Hakeem

+601118544287

Grab Support

gp.my.salesops@grabtaxi.com

Eligibility

Entity Type

Eligible

Local Domestic MY Entity Sdn Bhd / Bhd

✅

Local Domestic MY Entity Sole Prop

✅

Local Domestic MY Entity Association

✅

Local Domestic MY Entity LLP / Partnership

✅

Foreign Entity

❌

Local / Foreign Individual

❌

Merchant Requirements

Category

Requirements

Prerequisite

PayLater whitelisting can only be activated by GrabPay AFTER a merchant is successfully onboarded for GrabPay One-Time or Tokenized payment.

Notification and Verification

Neither Merchant Operations (MO) nor the Merchant will receive an automated activation notification.

The PayLater option will automatically appear on the merchant's checkout page for users. Merchants must manually verify by attempting a transaction.

SLA

Entity Origin

SLA

Local Entity

Whitelisting Period: 3 to 5 business days

Note: This is in addition to the standard SLA required for the initial GrabPay One-Time or Tokenized payment onboarding.

Onboarding Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

The merchant submits a request via dashboard by selecting "Yes" for "Does your business need to accept Grab PayLater?" during GrabPay One-Time/Tokenized activation.

Merchant

2

Once a merchant clicks 'Submit' for activation, the request will automatically reflect in #mo-request.

For Grab PayLater, please check the spreadsheet link (Column Q). It will state 'YES' if the merchant has requested to activate 'GrabPay One-Time' and/or 'GrabPay Tokenized' in the Channel Approvals and Activations in AD.

Request and Spreadsheet Example :


3

MO must first activate GrabPay One-Time/Tokenized to obtain a Store ID. PayLater application cannot proceed without this ID.

Application must be in sequence, apply for Grabpay first > get Store Grab ID > apply for Grab Paylater

MO

4

MO to fill up the Grab Paylater Merchant Onboarding Submission List from column in Green and in column P, MO select Merchant-Funded PayLater by Grab to enable onetime/tokenized and Grabpaylater altogether.

  • If a merchant has a custom rate, fill up the custom rate from column I to column Q,R,S and mark YES in column T.

  • If merchant under standard rate, can follow the standard rate BAU in column Q,R,S

5

Grabpay will review the merchant and provide the whitelist status in column AB

6

Another situation where merchant come to CS and to request for Paylater after Grabpay Onetime / tokenized has been activated, MO to fill the Grab Paylater Merchant Onboarding Submission List and column P to choose the Merchant-Funded PayLater by Grab for Grabpaylater selection and complete everything highlighted under Green

Status and Go Live date example :

Activation Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

After filling out Grab Paylater Merchant Onboarding Submission List , Grab reviews and provides the whitelist status (Col AB)

Status and Go Live date example :

MO

2

MO checks the status/date and informs the merchant to test the payment option on their end.

Rejection Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1

MO agent is responsible for notifying the merchant directly regarding the rejection.

MO

2

This is a manual "self-serve" process. The MO agent must send a manual email update to the merchant informing them of the rejection result.

3

All rejection notifications must be sent using the official Merchant Operations email: merchantops@xendit.co.
